title: hello world
contents:
I will be using this site as an exercise in writing / coding. The purpose of this first post is just to help me figure out how to set up the blog in the first place. 1 More interesting stuff will be coming next.
I’ll also share some visualizations made with ggplot2. For example, did you know that a pie chart is just a stacked bar chart in a polar coordinate system?


library(ggplot2)

df <- data.frame(type = c("mouth", "body"), size = c(4, 15))

g <- ggplot(df, aes(x = "", y = size, fill = type)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", show.legend = FALSE)

g



g + coord_polar(theta = "y")



g + coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#FFD104", "#fefffc")) + 
    theme_void()








I’m using the distill package to set this up.↩︎
